name: git-hook-guard
description: Automatically scans opened Git repositories for malicious git hooks (remote-code-execution droppers) and lets you quarantine them before they can run.

commands.title: Git Hook Guard: Scan Workspace for Malicious Hooks
Git Hook Guard: Quarantine Active Hooks in Workspace

gitHookGuard.scanOnOpen.description: Automatically scan the workspace for malicious git hooks when a window/folder opens.

gitHookGuard.flagAllActiveHooks.description: Also warn about ANY active (non-.sample) hook, not only ones matching known danger patterns.
